description: Autocorrect errors throughout: 'ducking' for a profanity, 'Tuesdays' for 'Tuesday', 'ship planning' for 'sprint planning'. Event is sprint planning on Tuesday at 11 AM in Conference Room B.

events.title: Sprint Planning
events.reasoning: Despite autocorrect errors ('ducking', 'Tuesdays', 'ship planning'), Bob explicitly corrects the event name to 'sprint planning' and confirms the details: Tuesday at 11 AM in Conference Room B.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 1 hour as standard for sprint planning. 'Tuesdays' interpreted as 'Tuesday' per context and Bob's correction. 'Ship planning' corrected to 'sprint planning' by Bob.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: sprint planning on Tuesday at 11 AM in Conference Room B with Alice and Bob.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Tuesday = 2026-02-24. Autocorrect failures: 'ducking' (profanity autocorrect), 'Tuesdays' (spurious plural), 'ship planning' (autocorrected from 'sprint planning'). Bob corrects the event title in conversation.
